name: Film Noir Look Book — Lighting & Mood Reference

seo.title: Film Noir Look Book & Mood Board
seo.description: A film noir look book: hard shadows, rain-slicked streets, venetian-blind light, and a moody monochrome palette — cinematography reference on one canvas.
seo.body: A cinematographer's reference board for the film noir look: low-key lighting, hard chiaroscuro shadows, venetian-blind slats, rain-slicked night streets, cigarette smoke, and the moody monochrome palette the style is built on. A visual look book assembled the way a DP or production designer would — references, notes, and a color story together on one shareable canvas. Made with Soleil Clusters.

cards.html:
FILM NOIR
Low-key light · hard shadow · rain & neon · monochrome mood

source.query: black and white hard shadow low key portrait
rainy night city street noir neon
venetian blinds light shadow black and white
cigarette smoke dramatic black and white

cards.html:
Lighting notes
Single hard key, deep falloff. Rim to separate from black. Practicals for motivation. Let the blacks crush.
